title: pentacalia calyculata
intro: Pentacalia calyculata, also known as the Mexican Pentacalia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae, native to Mexico and Central America. The medicinal properties of Pentacalia calyculata include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Pentacalia calyculata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to promote overall health and well-being.
